headlines: WIRE — Polymarket: 'Strait of Hormuz fully reopened by April 30' trading at 18 cents. Down from 34 cents last week.

WIRE — Polymarket: 'Oil above $150 by March 31' surges to 68 cents after overnight IRGC threat. $38M in volume.
WIRE — Polymarket: 'US recession by December 2026' jumps to 42 cents from 24 cents at start of month.
WIRE — Polymarket: Six wallets flagged by onchain analysts for suspected insider trading on Iran strike timing. Combined profit: $1.2M.
WIRE — Polymarket creates market: 'Trump approval below 35% by April 15?' Currently trading at 29 cents.
WIRE — Polymarket: 'Iran regime change by December 2026' drops to 12 cents. Post-Khamenei succession appears stable.
WIRE — Polymarket: 'US ground invasion of Iran by June 2026' at 16 cents. Volume spiking after Hegseth's 15,000 targets claim.
ECON — Polymarket traders have wagered $529M on Iran-related contracts since Feb 28. Platform's largest-ever event.
WIRE — Polymarket: 'Joe Kent-style resignation within 30 days?' New market launches at 34 cents after NCTC director quits.
DOMESTIC — Polymarket: 'Trump impeachment proceedings by 2027' rises to 19 cents from 8 cents pre-war.
WIRE — Polymarket: 'Kushner financial scandal leads to investigation?' Trading at 41 cents. $7M in volume.
